PUBLIC POLICY MAJOR

THIS CATALOG (https://academiccatalog.umd.edu/undergraduate/ addenda/#public_policy_major).

School of Public Policy 1100 Thurgood Marshall Hall Phone: 301-405-6330 plcyundergrad@umd.edu http://spp.umd.edu/your-education/undergraduate/public-policy-major/

C- or better is required in all major courses and the cumulative average of these courses must be a 2.0.
